title: Benstonea andersonii
taxonomy: Benstonea andersonii is classified within the family Pandanaceae and is a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the genus Benstonea, which is a group of plants native to Southeast Asia. The exact classification of Benstonea andersonii within the Pandanaceae family is still being researched and refined. However, it is generally accepted as a member of the order Pandanales. Benstonea andersonii is a rare and endemic species found in Malaysia.
